nodes.label: Ather 450X
nodes.content: Price: 1.45 lakh. Range: 150 km. Top Speed: 90 kmph. 0-40 in 3.3 sec.

nodes.label: Ather 450S
nodes.content: Price: 1.15 lakh. Range: 115 km. Top Speed: 90 kmph. Budget friendly model.

nodes.label: Ather Rizta
nodes.content: Family scooter. Large storage space. Range: 123 km. Very comfortable seating.

nodes.label: Ather Grid
nodes.content: Fast charging network. 15km range in 10 mins charging. Over 1000+ points across India.

nodes.label: Ather Warranty
nodes.content: 5 years battery warranty. Pro-care plans available for service and roadside assistance.

nodes.label: Bangalore JP Nagar
nodes.content: Ather Space Indiranagar. Test rides available. Open 10 AM to 8 PM.
